description: Tests for survival difference based on cls file
author: Yujin Hoshida (Broad Institute)
plan:
## SurvivalDifference GenePattern Module — Implementation Plan

### 1. Overview
SurvivalDifference is a GenePattern module that Tests for survival difference based on cls file

### 2. Parameters
The module exposes 8 parameters:
- Required: input.surv.data.file, time.field, censor.field, test.type, output.filename
- Optional: input.cls.file, cls.field, subgroup

### 3. Command Line
```
<R2.5> <libdir>SurvivalDifference.R SurvivalDifference <input.surv.data.file> -c<input.cls.file> <time.field> <censor.field> -f<cls.field> <test.type> -gr<subgroup> <output.filename>
```

### 4. Docker Image
Docker image: 

### 5. Validation Strategy
- Validate all required parameters are provided
- Validate file formats match expected extensions
- Check parameter value ranges where applicable

### 6. Implementation Roadmap
Phase 1: Wrapper script implementation
Phase 2: Docker container setup
Phase 3: Parameter validation and error handling
Phase 4: Testing and documentation

parameters.name: input.surv.data.file
parameters.description: input clinical data including survival time & censor status  -.txt

parameters.name: censor.field
parameters.description: Name of censor field (value should be "event\:1, no event\: 0")

parameters.name: cls.field
parameters.description: Name of class field in survival data file (optional)

parameters.name: subgroup
parameters.description: Suggroups (classes) to be compared (e.g., A, C as in 3rd line of cls file)
